## Change Type

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] ✨ Feature — new functionality
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix — fixes incorrect behaviour
- [ ] 🚑 Hotfix — critical production fix
- [ ] 📝 Docs — documentation only
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor — no functional change
- [ ] ⚡ Performance — improves speed or efficiency
- [ ] 🧪 Tests — adds or updates tests
- [ ] 🔧 Chore — build, config, or tooling change

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `develop` (rebased or merged)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../.github/CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-format)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added comments for complex or non-obvious logic
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] All GitHub Actions checks are passing
- [ ] At least one approving review has been requested
